justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical, atomic update fix proposed with specific SQL (`UPDATE ... WHERE stock >= $qty`), TOCTOU named and explained, safe_to_deploy false, partial failure (cart add before decrement) noted as a separate Critical finding, confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU explicitly named and clearly explained with concrete reproduction steps
Atomic compare-and-decrement SQL provided as primary fix, SELECT FOR UPDATE as alternative
Partial failure between cart.addItem and decrementStock identified as separate Critical finding with transaction-based fix
Bonus: caught negative quantity input validation issue not in rubric
Bonus: idempotency and rate limiting concerns raised as important issues
Production readiness section correctly notes overselling is guaranteed under concurrency, not merely possible

trials.justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical, atomic update fix proposed (SELECT FOR UPDATE transaction + atomic WHERE clause mentioned in suggestions), TOCTOU explicitly named, safe_to_deploy false, partial failure (cart add before decrement) noted as a separate Critical finding, confidence.level 95 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU explicitly named with clear reproduction steps showing stock going to -1
Partial failure between addItem and decrementStock identified as separate Critical finding
Fix includes both SELECT FOR UPDATE transaction and mentions atomic WHERE clause alternative in suggestions
Bonus finding: negative quantity exploit is a valid additional catch
Well-stated assumptions about what the db layer may or may not do
Excellent reproduction steps for both race condition and negative quantity issues

trials.justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical, atomic update fix proposed (UPDATE...WHERE stock >= $qty with row count check), TOCTOU named explicitly, safe_to_deploy false, partial failure (cart add before decrement) noted as separate Critical finding, confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU named in title and explanation, with concrete reproduction scenario showing stock going to -1
Atomic fix is specific: UPDATE products SET stock = stock - $qty WHERE id = $id AND stock >= $qty with affected row check, plus SELECT FOR UPDATE alternative
Partial failure risk identified as separate Critical finding with transaction-based fix
Bonus: caught negative quantity exploit — a valid Critical finding not in the rubric
Low confidence areas appropriately caveat that internal DB implementation could affect severity
Reproduction steps are concrete and actionable for all findings
